builtBy: Blumenkopf — editorial design-studio template (self-aware; in-page 'buy this website' motif)
captureMethod: CloakBrowser full-depth crawl (10 pages) + deep_nuance pass-2 (cssVars, fonts, animEls) + scroll motion timeline
archetype: editorial design-studio — light mode, Swiss-line-divided grid, oversized mixed-case wordmark

designTokens.line: 3px solid #000 — the primary structural motif (section dividers, card meta, grid gutters)

motion.stack: CSS transitions + Vue <transition> on the source; reconstructed here as framer-motion + Tailwind keyframes (no GSAP, no Lenis)

presets.gate: scroll-gated opacity+Y reveal (~0.6s ease-out) — captured divs op 0→0.2→1
presets.carouselFade: Hooper slide opacity cross-fade 0.5s — work/case media
presets.marquee: orange 'buy this website' banner, horizontal infinite ~22s linear

notes: Original is a Nuxt/Vue site; this blank re-expresses it as Next.js App Router.
Every text node carries an agent-ready prompt preserving chunk size, tone and avoid-list — see prompts/README.md.
All media are PartImage drag-drop upload zones; no source assets are shipped.
The orange marquee ('buy this website') is the signature meta motif — the template advertises itself; rebrand freely.
